authority_scope.scope: synthetic evidence packets requiring a recommendation and reconciliation register
authority_scope.methodology_source_role: supports the source/task separation experiment only; it is not the authority for the procedure

propositions.statement: Treat a record as decision-eligible only when its named issuer has authority for the record's stated scope and the record is valid at the decision time.
A later record supersedes an earlier record only when both address the same subject and scope; otherwise retain the discrepancy as unresolved.
Recommend proceed only with at least two independent eligible supporting records and no unresolved eligible blocker; otherwise recommend hold and name the minimum resolving evidence.
Reconcile every supplied record in a register with its eligibility, role, and effect on the recommendation.

contradictions.resolution: Recency cannot cure wrong authority or scope; unresolved cross-scope disagreement remains visible.

artifact_conventions.deliverable: decision memo plus complete evidence register

failure_signatures.signature: wrong-scope or expired record counted as eligible
recency used to erase a cross-scope contradiction

leakage_signatures: at least two independent eligible supporting records
supersedes an earlier record only when both address the same subject and scope
claim_boundary: All content is a builder-authored internal design hypothesis for contract calibration; it is not expert-approved or professionally validated.
